title: Katalis
description: Contains a set of libraries written by me, packaged into one JAR for easy integration.
body:
A utility library for Minecraft mods and plugins, bundling several useful libraries into a single JAR for easier integration.

### Included Libraries

- **LangMan** — Language management system with multi-instance support and i18n utilities.  
- **Beacon** — Lightweight event handling API for Java/Kotlin applications.  
- **Yacla** — Modular and extensible configuration loader supporting YAML, JSON, TOML, and database backends.  
- **Cask** — Time-aware and size-limited cache with optional eviction strategies and TTL-based GC.
- **AkkaraDB** - Low-latency, crash-safe JVM KV store with WAL & stripe parity

Designed for both **Fabric** environments. Perfect for developers looking to streamline common functionality.
